title: Selling Stock Photos Without PayPal: An Honest Side-by-Side Breakdown — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: If you're a photographer in Nigeria or Ghana, you're likely facing a frustrating barrier to selling your stock photos: PayPal's restrictions. The payment giant blocks transactions in your countries, forcing you to choose between abandoning your business or finding a workaround. But what if you could sell your photos without PayPal? A permanent solution exists, and we're about to break down the alternatives and help you make an informed decision.
What Each Option Actually Offers

Let's start with the reality-check: PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip all operate under the same constraints that exclude photographers in Nigeria and Ghana. They're bound by global regulations and limitations, which ultimately mean you're blocked. In contrast, Unchained Commerce provides a robust infrastructure for creating digital stores, including stock photo sales, without relying on these restricted platforms. Our solution offers automated delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts, making it seamless to get paid and deliver your photos to customers. With Unchained Commerce, you'll never have to worry about country-specific restrictions or account freezes again.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

PayPal, Stripe, and the like often justify their country restrictions by citing anti-money laundering and anti-terrorism laws. However, this means they're essentially shutting out legitimate creators like you from accessing their services. In contrast, Unchained Commerce leverages NOWPayments as its payment processor, which accepts over 300 cryptocurrencies and doesn't require costly KYC (Know Your Customer) verification. This means you can focus on selling your photos, not navigating red tape and lengthy verification processes. With Unchained Commerce, you'll never be locked out of your digital store due to geographical or banking limitations.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

Another crucial consideration is payment speed and fees. Traditional platforms often charge transaction fees ranging from 2.9% + $0.30 to 3.5% + $0.35 per transaction. With Unchained Commerce, you'll enjoy no transaction fees or account freezes, ever. You'll get instant payment confirmation, and your customers will receive automated delivery of their purchased photos. This streamlined process saves you time and minimizes lost revenue due to unnecessary fees.
Unchained Commerce is the only digital store infrastructure that accepts over 300 cryptocurrencies, including Bitcoin, Ethereum, and USDT.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

To run a successful digital store, you need automation and delivery capabilities that are both reliable and customizable. Unchained Commerce provides the Full Stack Bundle ($79.99), which includes everything you need to create a seamless shopping experience for your customers. This includes the Core Engine, Wallet Connect, and Admin Dashboard, all of which work in harmony to handle transactions, automate delivery, and provide real-time analytics. With Unchained Commerce, you can focus on growing your business, not juggling multiple platforms and dealing with technical issues.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

If you're a photographer in Nigeria or Ghana looking to sell stock photos without PayPal, Unchained Commerce is the clear winner. Our solution provides a robust infrastructure for digital stores, automated delivery, payment verification, and seamless customer experiences. We don't rely on restricted platforms or charge exorbitant fees. With Unchained Commerce, you can focus on creating and selling your photos, not navigating the complexities of traditional payment gateways.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

The direct answer is NOWPayments combined with the Core Shop Engine. NOWPayments is a crypto payment processor that requires no KYC from merchants and no account creation from buyers. It supports over 300 coins and sends a webhook to your backend when a payment confirms on-chain. The Core Shop Engine receives that webhook, verifies the transaction, generates a receipt, and delivers the product automatically. The key difference between this and a platform workaround is that it is not a workaround — it is a different infrastructure layer entirely. There is no platform that can suspend your access, no compliance team that can flag your account, and no payout schedule that delays your revenue. Your funds go directly to a wallet you control the moment a transaction confirms.
Our payment processor, NOWPayments, doesn't require costly KYC verification, saving you time and money.
